title: Round Table Cradock 37 spreads hope for Christmas
description: CRADOCK NEWS - The Round Table Cradock 37...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - The Round Table Cradock 37 club presented its Hope for Kids Christmas Project on Saturday 20 December in Cradock (Nxuba), spreading hope and joy to local children.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - The Round Table Cradock 37 club presented its Hope for Kids Christmas Project on Saturday 20 December in Cradock (Nxuba), spreading hope and joy to local children."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Toys, gifts and festive treats were distributed to children at the Michausdal Child Care Centre and Michausdal Day Care, ensuring that many young lives experienced the magic of Christmas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Round Table Cradock 37 expressed their appreciation to all who contributed to the project. Local businesses and private individuals in Cradock generously opened their hearts and hands, donating time, resources and goodwill to help bring smiles and happiness to children in need during the festive season.","html":"Round Table Cradock 37 expressed their appreciation to all who contributed to the project. Local businesses and private individuals in Cradock generously opened their hearts and hands, donating time, resources and goodwill to help bring smiles and happiness to children in need during the festive season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Each donation made Christmas a little brighter and more meaningful for those who needed it most,” said Wium Hagen, media contributor for Round Table Cradock 37.","html":"“Each donation made Christmas a little brighter and more meaningful for those who needed it most,” said Wium Hagen, media contributor for Round Table Cradock 37."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We truly appreciate every contribution, big or small. Each one made a difference.”","html":"“We truly appreciate every contribution, big or small. Each one made a difference.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the club hopes the kindness shown will be returned many times over. “Thank you to everyone who played a role in keeping hope alive in our community,” he said.","html":"He said the club hopes the kindness shown will be returned many times over. “Thank you to everyone who played a role in keeping hope alive in our community,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Round Table Cradock 37 spreads hope for Christmas
